reviews.comment:
El lugar está limpio, las instalaciones funcionan bien. Deberían trabajar en la eficiencia al momento de las cargas de combustible. Los playeros demoran demasiado en atender a los autos. Es claramente mejorable. Eso achicaria las colas esperando para cargar y los consecuentes inconvenientes de tránsito ocasionados por la fila de autos esperando.

(Translated by Google)
The place is clean, and the facilities work well. They should improve the efficiency of the fueling process. The attendants take too long to serve the cars. It's clearly an area for improvement. This would shorten the lines waiting to refuel and the resulting traffic problems caused by the queue of cars waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4b05fcDl3RRAB
